mapper.sql: id, provider_code, provider_sector_id, market_code, sector_name, top_name, tracking_symbol, enabled, auto_collect_enabled, collect_interval_minutes, last_refreshed_at, last_auto_collected_at, collection_state, next_retry_at, consecutive_failures, last_error_code, run_claim_token, run_claimed_at, last_error, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_sector_watch (provider_code, provider_sector_id, market_code, sector_name, top_name, tracking_symbol, enabled) VALUES (#{providerCode}, #{providerSectorId}, #{marketCode}, #{sectorName}, #{topName}, #{trackingSymbol}, #{enabled})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM market_sector_watch WHERE provider_code = #{providerCode} AND provider_sector_id = #{providerSectorId}
mapper.update: UPDATE market_sector_watch SET enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE market_sector_watch SET auto_collect_enabled = #{autoCollectEnabled}, collect_interval_minutes = #{collectIntervalMinutes}, collection_state = 'IDLE', next_retry_at = NULL, consecutive_failures = 0, last_error_code = NULL, last_error = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM market_sector_watch WHERE enabled = TRUE AND auto_collect_enabled = TRUE AND collection_state NOT IN ('BLOCKED_AUTH', 'BLOCKED_PERMISSION', 'BLOCKED_CONFIG') AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= #{now}) ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE market_sector_watch SET run_claim_token = #{token}, run_claimed_at = #{claimedAt}, collection_state = 'ACTIVE' WHERE id = #{id} AND (run_claim_token IS NULL OR run_claimed_at IS NULL OR run_claimed_at < #{staleBefore})
UPDATE market_sector_watch SET run_claim_token = NULL, run_claimed_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND run_claim_token = #{token}

UPDATE market_sector_watch SET last_refreshed_at = #{refreshedAt}, last_auto_collected_at = CASE WHEN #{autoCollected} = TRUE THEN #{refreshedAt} ELSE last_auto_collected_at END, collection_state = 'IDLE', next_retry_at = NULL, consecutive_failures = 0, last_error_code = NULL, last_error = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND run_claim_token = #{token}
UPDATE market_sector_watch SET last_refreshed_at = #{refreshedAt}, last_error = #{lastError} WHERE id = #{id}
